about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: AI Engineer passionate about building systems that make a real difference
about.bio: I'm Ossama Elhakki, an AI/ML Engineer based in Morocco. I specialize in building machine learning systems, computer vision pipelines, NLP solutions, and AI automation agents. With 35+ production-grade projects spanning fraud detection, medical imaging, and generative AI, I bring both depth and breadth to every problem.
about.bio2: Beyond the models, I build production AI agents using n8n and local LLMs — deployed for real Moroccan businesses. I'm bilingual in French and Arabic, which gives me a unique edge in the MENA and French-speaking markets.
